dismissalText.commentary: Sai Sudharsan c Short b Kamboj 84 (53b 7x4 4x6 106m) SR: 158.49

dismissalComment.html: Slot ball ends Sudharsan's knock. He looked to slap a full, wide 132ks ball down the ground. Got on one knee and almost seemed to try and go inside out. Bat turned outwards and it went right under long-off's throat. Batter smacks hit bat on the way back, good innings though

dismissalText.commentary: Shubman Gill c Dube b Johnson 64 (37b 7x4 3x6 69m) SR: 172.97

dismissalComment.html: Out? Midwicket runs back, great catch from Dube. Took it head-high and fell back into the ground, landed his left elbow first to ensure ball didn't get close to ground. Gill shakes his head and walks back. 140ks fullish ball from around the wicket, Gill looking to use the angle by flicking it with whippy wrists. Got low and swished with good hand speed, got it low off the bat

dismissalText.commentary: Rahul Tewatia run out (Gaikwad) 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: Big cheers for a direct hit at the non-striker's. Tewatia slid the bat but didn't hurry... and the first replay shows he's inches behind as the bails lit up. Was a yorker on off that was driven along the ground. Gaikwad picked the ball up to his right after running across and threw it on the bounce

dismissalText.commentary: Shubman Gill c Dube b Johnson 64 (37b 7x4 3x6 69m) SR: 172.97

dismissalComment.html: Out? Midwicket runs back, great catch from Dube. Took it head-high and fell back into the ground, landed his left elbow first to ensure ball didn't get close to ground. Gill shakes his head and walks back. 140ks fullish ball from around the wicket, Gill looking to use the angle by flicking it with whippy wrists. Got low and swished with good hand speed, got it low off the bat

dismissalText.commentary: Ruturaj Gaikwad b Mohammed Siraj 16 (7b 1x4 2x6 10m) SR: 228.57

dismissalComment.html: Siraj knocks Gaikwad over! Gaikwad was looking for another one of those pickup shots. Siraj pulls back his length slightly and it jags in from outside off. Gaikwad tried to play the same shot as the last ball but misses the ball completely and the ball crashes into top of off. Away goes Siraj for his Siuuuu-lebration. Gaikwad's intent today would have been a breath of fresh air for CSK fans, but the knock is over too early, from their perspective

dismissalText.commentary: Ruturaj Gaikwad b Mohammed Siraj 16 (7b 1x4 2x6 10m) SR: 228.57

dismissalComment.html: Siraj knocks Gaikwad over! Gaikwad was looking for another one of those pickup shots. Siraj pulls back his length slightly and it jags in from outside off. Gaikwad tried to play the same shot as the last ball but misses the ball completely and the ball crashes into top of off. Away goes Siraj for his Siuuuu-lebration. Gaikwad's intent today would have been a breath of fresh air for CSK fans, but the knock is over too early, from their perspective

Chunked it off the upper half

dismissalText.commentary: Spencer Johnson c †Buttler b Rabada 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: Appeal for caught behind, not given. GT review. Johnson removes his gloves and helmet, looks like this is out. Hard length on middle and off, Johnson showed all three stumps and looked to defend straight... and Hawk-Eye shows he got a thin feather. GT, with a net run rate 0.699, have all but confirmed their spot in the top-two. CSK's campaign is done!
